top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran trade strikes putting new strain on Mideast ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The U.S. said its strikes were a response to "unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iranian forces" that "clearly violated the ceasefire."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX bonds sell off days after AI and rocket group’s $25bn debt deal
top_signals.summary: Yields move towards levels commonly associated with junk-rated companies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
